summary: Completed frontend testing of new Follow page and Product comparison features - All requested functionality working perfectly
passed_tests: Follow page loads with mock social media posts (11 total: 6 X/Twitter, 5 LinkedIn)
Follow page platform filtering (All Platforms, X/Twitter, LinkedIn tabs)
Follow page account type filtering (All Sources, Institutional, Companies, Analysts, Media)
Follow page search functionality (tested with 'NATO' search - returned 2 relevant posts)
Navigation includes new Follow menu item with RSS icon
Products page Compare mode activation via Compare button
Products page multi-select functionality (2-3 products selection)
Products comparison modal displays with comprehensive table
Comparison shows category, type, status, specifications, and materials
Mock social media data properly categorized by account types
All data-testid attributes present for robust testing
